name: Southern Gold Limited
summary: Southern Gold Limited engages in the exploration and production of gold deposits in South Korea. The company also explores for silver and other mineral deposits. It holds 100% interests in the Beopseongpo gold project, Aphae gold project, Deokon gold-silver project, Weolyu gold-silver project, and Neungju gold project located in South Korea. The company, through a joint venture agreement with Bluebird Merchant Ventures Ltd, holds 50% interests in the Gubong and Kochang projects located in South Korea. Southern Gold Limited was founded in 2004 and is based in Stepney, Australia.
